summary: Iteration 133 - Admin Panel fixes: PricingHub Pillar Bundles (13 pillars), Bundle price editing (PATCH), Product count (3987), Services, BundlesManager, LearnManager/CareManager/DineManager/EnjoyManager Bundles tabs. 15/15 backend tests passed. Frontend critical flows all working. P0 crash resolved.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin > Celebrate (14 PILLARS sidebar) sets activeTab='celebrate' but NO component renders for this tab - blank page shown. CelebrateManager only renders at activeTab='products' (dead code path). Celebrate is unreachable via 14 PILLARS Celebrate button.

issues: priced_products shows 0 while 3987 products exist - all products are unpriced (no cost/margin set). This is a data gap not a code bug but worth noting for admin UX.

action_items: Fix Admin > Celebrate (14 PILLARS) - add render case: {activeTab === 'celebrate' && <CelebrateManager getAuthHeader={getAuthHeaders} />} in Admin.jsx
Fix React key warning in LearnManager - 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in bundle items map
Consider removing or fixing: {activeTab === 'products' && <CelebrateManager />} which is dead/incorrect code at Admin.jsx line 3864
critical_code_review_comments: Admin.jsx line 3864: `{activeTab === 'products' && <CelebrateManager />}` is dead code - the COMMERCE Products button sets activeTab to 'topic-products', not 'products'. CelebrateManager is effectively unreachable.
Admin.jsx line 2433: Sidebar 'Pillars' section has { id: 'celebrate', label: 'Celebrate' } but no matching render case for activeTab === 'celebrate' - shows blank page when clicked.
LearnManager.jsx: Missing unique key props on bundle items list - React warning logged to console.
bundle_routes.py get_bundles: limit param is ignored (hardcoded to 100 in cursor.to_list(length=100)). With 39 bundles this is fine but could be a future issue.

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All P0 features work, CelebrateManager nav issue found

seed_data_creation: Created and soft-deleted test bundle 'TEST_Integration Bundle' (celebrate pillar) during CRUD test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 admin panel fixes verified working: (1) PricingHub Pillar Bundles tab shows 13 pillars with 40 bundles, (2) Bundle PATCH pricing works inline, (3) 3987 products in Product Pricing tab, (4) Services tab shows 1118 services, (5) BundlesManager (COMMERCE > Bundles) works with 42 items, (6) CareManager/DineManager/EnjoyManager/LearnManager Bundles tabs all load without crash. Main remaining issue: CelebrateManager is unreachable via Admin > Celebrate nav button - needs Admin.jsx fix to add render case for activeTab === 'celebrate'.

pricing_hub_pillar_bundles.evidence: 40 bundles across 13 pillars, all tabs clickable, no crash. Pillars: celebrate(5), dine(4), stay(1), travel(2), care(3), fit(1), enjoy(2), learn(6), farewell(3), emergency(3), adopt(5), advisory(4), paperwork(1)

bundle_inline_price_editing.evidence: Edit button opens inputs, price change saved via PATCH /api/bundles/{id}/pricing, discount recalculated (1400/1000 = 29%)

product_pricing_tab.evidence: Stats card shows 3987 total products, confirmed via API /api/admin/pricing/stats

bundles_manager.evidence: COMMERCE > Bundles shows Curated Bundles Manager with 42 bundle items, all pillar filter tabs

learn_manager_bundles.evidence: LearnManager Bundles tab loads without crash (has React key warning)

care_manager_bundles.evidence: CareManager Bundles tab loads with object items (small, xs, long_coat tags displayed correctly)

dine_manager_bundles.evidence: DineManager Bundles tab loads without crash

enjoy_manager_bundles.evidence: EnjoyManager Bundles tab shows Featured Bundles without crash

celebrate_manager.evidence: Admin > Celebrate button (14 PILLARS section) shows blank page - activeTab='celebrate' has no render case in Admin.jsx. CelebrateManager component itself has no crash issues but is unreachable.

architecture_audit.evidence: /api/docs/architecture-audit returns 200 HTML with full API documentation table
